message:
feat(stdlib): add StringFastPathEligibility gating and observation mode tracking

Extend the string representation receipt system with fast-path eligibility
analysis for runtime, optimizer, and cache consumers:

- StringObservationMode enum: ScalarAlignedUtf16 vs BoundarySensitiveUtf16
  to track whether a string operation's result depends on Unicode boundary
  sensitivity (affects fast-path eligibility for non-BMP characters)
- StringFastPathConsumer enum: Runtime, Optimizer, Cache with as_str()
  for structured error messages
- StringFastPathEligibility struct: per-consumer eligibility flags
  (view_eligible, runtime_eligible, optimizer_eligible, cache_eligible)
  with a stable_cache_key for memoization
- StringFastPathGateError: structured error type with four variants
  (MissingReceipt, BoundarySensitiveUnicode, FlattenBudgetExceeded,
  IneligibleRepresentation) implementing Display and Error traits
- StringRepresentationReceipt gains stable_hash, observation_mode,
  and view_eligible fields for downstream consumption

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
